features: PACK CONTENTS: Set of 12 press-on nails in six assorted sizes, perfect for achieving a professional manicure look at home.
EASY APPLICATION: Features convenient adhesive backing for quick attachment and removal from natural nails, offering a fuss-free alternative to nail polish.
VERSATILE SIZING: Includes multiple size options to ensure a proper fit for different nail beds, providing a natural and comfortable wearing experience.
ELEGANT DESIGN: Crafted from high-quality aqua and polyacrylic materials to create a sophisticated and natural-looking finish.
RETAIL READY: Comes presented in a counter display unit (CDU), measuring 14.8 cm x 7.2 cm x 1.2 cm for convenient merchandising.
description: Transform your look instantly with Forever Beautiful Press-On Nails, a convenient alternative to traditional nail polish. Each 12-pack contains six assorted sizes to ensure a perfect fit for every finger. These elegant artificial nails feature a pre-applied adhesive backing for quick application and easy removal, making them ideal for both special occasions and everyday wear. Crafted from durable aqua and polyacrylic materials, these press-on nails provide a sophisticated, natural-looking finish that complements any outfit or style. The compact counter display unit measures 14.8 cm x 7.2 cm x 1.2 cm, making it perfect for retail presentation. Whether you're preparing for a special event or simply want to maintain beautifully manicured nails without the salon visit, these press-on nails deliver professional-looking results in minutes.
